hero.badge: Cambridge IGCSE · AS & A Levels · IB
hero.subtitle: Expert tutoring for Cambridge IGCSE, A Levels, and IB students worldwide. Personalized guidance to unlock your full potential.

about.label: About Us
about.title: Empowering Students to
about.description: EduRush Academy is an international online academic support academy dedicated to helping students succeed in globally recognized curricula, including Cambridge IGCSE, AS & A Levels, and the International Baccalaureate (IB). We provide structured tutoring, exam preparation, and personalized guidance designed to strengthen understanding, build confidence, and improve academic performance. In addition, our professional development programs help students develop essential soft and digital skills needed to thrive in today's competitive world.
about.missionDesc: To make high-quality academic support accessible to every student, regardless of location, empowering them to excel in globally recognized curricula.
about.visionDesc: To be the leading online academy for international education, nurturing the next generation of global thinkers and leaders.
about.globalDesc: Based in Tunis and operating online, EduRush Academy supports learners locally and internationally as they grow into confident thinkers, innovators, and future leaders.

programs.label: Academic Programs
programs.title: Curricula We
programs.subtitle: Tailored academic programs designed to help students master their curriculum and achieve outstanding results.
programs.igcseDesc: At EduRush Academy, we provide comprehensive IGCSE Cambridge International Education programs designed to equip students with the skills and knowledge needed for future academic success. Our experienced instructors guide learners through a well-structured curriculum that emphasizes critical thinking, creativity, and problem-solving. We focus on a supportive learning environment where students can thrive and build confidence in their abilities.
programs.alevelsDesc: EduRush Academy provides specialized online academic support for students preparing for Cambridge International AS & A Level examinations. Our expert tutors help learners deepen subject understanding, strengthen analytical thinking, and develop the independent study skills required for advanced academic success. Through structured lessons, exam-focused preparation, and personalized guidance, we support students alongside their school education to help them achieve top results.
programs.ibDesc: EduRush Academy provides specialized online academic support for students following the International Baccalaureate (IB) programme. Our experienced tutors assist learners in strengthening subject understanding, developing critical thinking skills, and preparing effectively for internal assessments and final examinations. Through structured guidance, exam-focused strategies, and personalized tutoring, we complement school learning and help students build confidence.

whyUs.label: Why Choose Us
whyUs.title: The EduRush
whyUs.subtitle: We go beyond tutoring to provide a complete academic success ecosystem.
whyUs.expertTutorsDesc: Highly qualified educators with years of experience in Cambridge and IB curricula.
whyUs.personalizedDesc: Tailored study plans that adapt to each student's pace, strengths, and goals.
whyUs.flexibleDesc: Sessions available around the clock to suit students across every timezone.
whyUs.provenDesc: 98% of our students improve by at least one full grade within their first term.
whyUs.progressDesc: Detailed analytics and regular reports keep students and parents informed.
whyUs.dedicatedDesc: Academic coordinators provide ongoing guidance beyond just tutoring sessions.

howItWorks.label: Our Process
howItWorks.title: How It
howItWorks.subtitle: A simple, structured approach to help you reach your academic goals.
howItWorks.assessmentDesc: We evaluate your current level, goals, and curriculum requirements through an initial consultation.
howItWorks.planDesc: A tailored study plan is crafted based on your strengths, weaknesses, and exam timeline.
howItWorks.sessionsDesc: Engage in interactive one-on-one or small group sessions with expert tutors.
howItWorks.trackingDesc: Regular reports and feedback ensure continuous improvement and goal achievement.
